title: A weekly voice-of-customer pulse stays current — themed feedback aggregates into per-theme facets, and the brief refreshes on a self-driven weekly cadence even when the inbox is quiet.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the pulse graph lights up once · inbox → theme taggers → voice-of-customer → weekly pulse

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: re-deliver the same feedback · every re-tick memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-skip
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · the pulse re-checks itself · valid_until not yet lapsed · no edges, no cost

beats.name: pricing-spike
beats.caption: HERO: a fresh pricing complaint lands · ONLY the pricing theme facet moves · performance / onboarding / integrations stay dark

beats.name: weekly-refresh
beats.caption: the weekly clock advances past valid_until · the pulse refreshes on cadence · zero tokens (no new material moved)

beats.name: dedup-skip
beats.caption: a duplicate feedback (byte-identical) re-delivers · its tagger dedup-skips · nothing downstream wakes

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · the pulse shipped · cost back to flat
